room.caption: [BubTowerMain] Ignore the B side for awhile.

instance.creationCode:
stringToShow="BUBBLE TOWER B#One can open this door after true ends have been achieved." signSize=3 image_yscale=1.75 visible=0
if global.gameCompleted=2 and global.gameProgress>=4970 {instance_destroy()}

bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=104 newMapY=304 toRoom=rBT_HUB x-=24
if global.gameCompleted<=1 or global.gameProgress<4970 {instance_destroy()}
